Class Controller

java.lang.Object
controller.Controller
Direct Known Subclasses:
BookingController, EventPerformanceController, MenuController, UserController
public abstract class Controller extends Object
Abstract base class for all controllers in the events app.

Provides shared state such as the currently logged-in user and the View for user interaction, along with convenience methods for checking the current user's role and for presenting menus.

All sub-controllers share the same View and currentUser reference, which are set via the MenuController.

    • selectFromMenu

      protected <T> int selectFromMenu(Collection<T> items, String menuPrompt)
      Presents a numbered menu from the given collection of items and returns the 1-based index chosen by the user.

      The user is shown a numbered list and prompted with the given menuPrompt. If the input is not a valid integer or is out of range, the method returns -1.

      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of the menu items
      Parameters:
      items - the collection of items to display
      menuPrompt - the prompt message shown to the user
      Returns:
      the 1-based index of the chosen item, or -1 if the input is invalid
